# awscc_cloudwatch_otel_enrichment (List Resource)

List all resources for `AWS::CloudWatch::OTelEnrichment` resource type.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "awscc_cloudwatch_otel_enrichment" "example" {
  provider = awscc
}
```
